case_title: DELGADO CESAR H. VS HUJAZI MONICA

docket_entries.description: CASE HEARD BY PRO TEM JUDGE STEVEN MACDONALD IN DEPT 7
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELGADO CESAR H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUJAZI MONICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-05-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
